collision energy: The IST voltage was optimized at 200 eV
fragmentation method: fragmentation of the protein was achieved using an additional 300 eV of activation in the higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) cell
instrument: Q Exactive Ultra High Mass Resolution (UHMR) Orbitrap
nMS was performed on a Thermo Q Exactive Ultra High Mass Resolution (UHMR) Orbitrap instrument
ionization type: to generate an electrospray of AqpZ proteomicelles
